overview: Single independent component with no dependencies, implemented in one phase.

phases.name: Foundation Service
phases.description: The sole Hello World API service has no dependencies and can be built directly.

components.name: hello-api
responsibilities: Serve GET / with a plain-text welcome message
Serve GET /hello returning 'Hello, World!' and reject non-GET methods with 405
Provide a fast GET /health endpoint for liveness checks
Return 404 for unknown paths and log each request
Support graceful shutdown and handle 100+ concurrent requests
components.architectureContext: Standalone HTTP service exposed on port 9090, deployed as a Docker container on Kubernetes. It has no upstream dependencies and is consumed directly by external HTTP clients.
keyConsiderations: Use http.ServeMux with explicit method checks in /hello handler to return 405 with Allow: GET header
Enforce exact path match ('/' only) in root handler to return 404 for unmatched paths
Set http.Server timeouts (Read=5s, Write=10s, Idle=60s) and implement SIGINT/SIGTERM graceful shutdown
Keep /health handler free of external calls to ensure sub-100ms response
Multi-stage Dockerfile (golang:1.22-alpine build, distroless/alpine runtime) running as non-root, EXPOSE 9090
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Hello World API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Minimal Hello World HTTP API
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:9090
paths:
  /:
    get:
      summary: Welcome message
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Welcome message
          content:
            text/plain:
              schema:
                type: string
  /hello:
    get:
      summary: Returns Hello, World!
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Hello message
          content:
            text/plain:
              schema:
                type: string
                example: Hello, World!
        '405':
          description: Method not allowed
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Service is healthy
          content:
            text/plain:
              schema:
                type: string
